value.0: Having explored the northlands extensively, a druid named Aawill commissioned the creation of these comfortable boots. Knowing he was heading for the sometimes-dangerous domain of the Neverwinter Woods, Aawill was looking for something helpful in combat, to lighten his need for armor. Since becoming the Archdruid for the Neverwinter Wood's Druid Grove, Aawill has commissioned several, more powerful versions of his original boots.

Upon every hit Blackmist's victims must successfully resist it's mist enchantment  or risk being temporary blinded by it.
This wide belt is made of thick leather and studded with iron. It grants the wearer the strength of a giant and the ability to make devastating melee attacks.
Epic Gloves of the Stone Heart
This Talisman of Paladin was only awarded to those soldiers of light who reached the highest order of Avatar.
A Glowing Talisman with a Silver symbol of Paladine.

Like many evil items, these robes are fashioned in great numbers by the Zhentarim and their minions. They are found far and wide across the Realms, and the more hands they touch, the more influence the Zhents enjoy.
A banner - stitched and dyed - denoting a point of interest.
